Confirming issues in the code:\n- The core code (export statements and source map comment) is straightforward and consistent across reports.\n- No evidence of code injection, dynamic code execution, or malicious payloads.\n- The embedded source map is standard in transpiled/minified code for debugging purposes.\n\n**Conclusion:**  \n**No malicious or security issues are present in the code itself.** The source map comment is typical, though somewhat uncommon in raw source files, but not suspicious.\n\n---\n\n### 2.
